content: We can repurpose the cross-modal semantic network alignment mechanism from cross-domain knowledge fusion to automatically align and unify the heterogeneous goal, capability, and memory semantic networks that emergent self-governing agents within the OpenClaw framework develop on their own. This alignment can enable distributed agents that were originally trained on disconnected tasks to spontaneously share fused domain knowledge without manual re-coding of their architectures.
source_topics: Semantic network alignment for cross-domain knowledge fusion
agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
trigger_topic: Semantic network alignment for cross-domain knowledge fusion
